Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-29 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong long-term performers with dramatically different risk profiles. AGX dominates with a rank #1 score of 97.2, posting extraordinary returns across all timeframes (1,761% over 10 years, 1,141% over 5 years) while maintaining pristine technical structure (all four moving averages aligned) and a "strong_buy" signal with clean momentum. FTI ranks second with similarly impressive medium-term performance (1,011% over 5 years, 168% over 1 year) but shows a critical weakness: its 10-year return of 221% dramatically lags its 5-year return, and it actually underperforms SPY and QQQ over the past decade (negative 17.63% and -276.89% respectively). This divergence suggests FTI's gains are concentrated in the recent bull cycle rather than representing sustained secular outperformance. AGX's consistent outperformance across all three benchmark comparisons (SPY, QQQ, IAU) at every timeframe indicates more robust, durable momentum compared to FTI's recent-cycle concentration.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
